creator: bsduck@mailo.com
text:
Hello,

Since the upgrade from 102 to 103, tabs trying to make use of WebGL instantly and invariably crash. For example Google Maps.

Disabling WebGL with 'webgl.disabled' in about:config stops the crashes.

13.1-STABLE amd64, latest packages

Intel HD Graphics 4000, drm-510-kmod
xf86-video-intel or modesetting (no difference)
